verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Walking in the path, out of light He said Tryin' out to find, Lord's provided way But there is goin' on, hard for me to explain Seems there is a call, returning point He says

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was caught up on the Lord's day Now I'm living on the eighth day Now I'm laying in the Presence of my Lord Singing glory, hallelujah Praising God my Lord, forever Now I'm restin' on the Sheperd of my soul

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I believe the Message, just like the others claim Without an understanding, simply quote and say But I have an expectation, He is goin' to explain Clear my understanding, on that very day

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm a seed of God, surely I can say They dont understand what Im tryin' to explain I just want to express, Lord's amazing grace Hebrew 13: 8, He will never change
